items.name: v4.3.2 (dev)
items.body:
# Local Generals.io v4.3.2 (dev)

Thank you for your continued support, and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special occasion, we are excited to release the **developers' version** of the new LocalGen!

While this is a developer-focused release, we’re presenting it as a stable version to replace the outdated v4.1.0, which was published almost two years ago and no longer meets the standards of today’s updates.

**Click the download links below to start your game!**

> **P.S.** If you haven’t installed the **Quicksand** font yet, please locate it in the `font` folder and install it before launching the game.

## Changelog

- **Fixed**: Adjusted the Lookout's vision range. Previously set to 3 in v4.3.1, it has now been reduced to 2.
- **Added**: Introducing the new **Watchtower** modifier!
- **Enhanced**: Major improvements to zlyBot v2 and gcBot! These robots are now more challenging to defeat.
- **Added**: New hotkeys for map creators! You can now use F1-F10 or the ↑↓ arrow keys to switch between tools.
- **Added**: New in-game speed adjustment options! You can find these controls at the top-left corner of the game window.
- **Fixed**: Replays should now run smoothly in mode 0.
- **Added**: Time stamp suffixes for replay files. Remember, you still need to rename the file to `replay.lgr` to watch it in the application.

## ATTENTION!

Bot contribution is now welcomed. Please read the instructions in #31.

**Note that LocalGen is built for and under Windows x64. To run on Mac or Linux, try using `wine`.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SZXC-WG/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.3.1D...v4.3.2D

items.author: AppOfficer

items.name: v4.3.1 (dev)
items.body:
# Local Generals.io v4.3.1 (dev)

Thank you for your continued support, and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special occasion, we are excited to release the **developers' version** of the new LocalGen!

While this is a developer-focused release, we’re presenting it as a stable version to replace the outdated v4.1.0, which was published almost two years ago and no longer meets the standards of today’s updates.

**Click the download links below to start your game!**

> **P.S.** If you haven’t installed the **Quicksand** font yet, please locate it in the `font` folder and install it before launching the game.

## Changelog

- **Fixed**: Corrected the Lookout's vision range. Priorly set to 2 in v4.3.0, it has now been updated to 3.

### Changelog of v4.3.0

- **Added**: Gap between blocks for improved layout and clarity.
- **Added**: Support for up to 16 players, enhancing multiplayer experience.
- **Fixed**: Replays now support a total number of turns up to 1,000,000, ensuring seamless playback.
- **Added**: New robots, including **szlyBot**, **gcBot**, and **zlyBot v2**, each bringing unique gameplay dynamics.
- **Added**: New tiles, including **Desert**, **Lookout**, and **Observatory**. These can now be experienced in-game or incorporated into your custom maps via the map creator tool!
- **Fixed**: Players will no longer spawn on tiles occupied by neutral troops.

## ATTENTION!

Bot contribution is now welcomed. Please read the instructions in #31.

**Note that LocalGen is built for and under Windows x64. To run on Mac or Linux, try using `wine`.**

**Full Changelog (covering v4.3.0)**: https://github.com/SZXC-WG/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.2.5D...v4.3.1D

items.name: v4.3.0 (dev)
items.body:
# Local Generals.io v4.3.0 (dev)

> **Important Notice**: The target branch for this release was incorrectly set to `master` instead of `v5.0`. As a result, please avoid downloading the last two assets of this release.

> **Update (2025/05/13)**: The binary files have been replaced to include the necessary font files. If you have already installed the fonts on your system, no further action is required. However, if you haven't installed them yet, please download the release again. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused.

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project! 

On this special day, we are glad to release this **developers' version** of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- **Added**: Gap between blocks for improved layout and clarity.
- **Added**: Support for up to 16 players, enhancing multiplayer experience.
- **Fixed**: Replays now support a total number of turns up to 1,000,000, ensuring seamless playback.
- **Added**: New robots, including **szlyBot**, **gcBot**, and **zlyBot v2**, each bringing unique gameplay dynamics.
- **Added**: New tiles, including **Desert**, **Lookout**, and **Observatory**. These can now be experienced in-game or incorporated into your custom maps via the map creator tool!
- **Fixed**: Players will no longer spawn on tiles occupied by neutral troops.

## ATTENTION!

Bot contribution is now welcomed. Please read the instructions in #31.

**Note that LocalGen is built for and under Windows x64. To run on Mac or Linux, try using `wine`.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SZXC-WG/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.2.5D...v4.3.0D

items.name: v4.2.5 (dev)
items.body:
# Local Generals.io v4.2.5 (dev)

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project! 

On this special day, we are glad to release this **developers' version** of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Added: New settings page! Try changing game settings. **Note that this feature might be unstable, so if you encounter bugs feel free to report them in the issues page.**
- Added: New game map. Check it out by yourself!
- Added: Modifiers.
- Fixed: zlyBot is now compatible with all game modes.
- The project has been migrated to the CMake build system.

## ATTENTION!

Bot contribution is now welcomed. Please read the instructions in #31.

**Note that LocalGen is built under Windows x64. To run on Mac or Linux, try using `wine`.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SZXC-WG/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.2.4D...v4.2.5D

items.name: v4.2.4 (dev)
items.body:
# Local Generals.io v4.2.4 (dev)

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this **developers' version** of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Added: Block number self-adaption like generals.io. No number suffixes!
- Added: Map zooming in local games. Now it zooms centering your mouse.
- Added: New bot zlyBot! It is much more clever than the other 3 bots. Check it out in game!
- Modified: Labyrinth improvement. Now it's more "labyrinth", and all cities have neutral armies of 40.
- Modified: smartRandomBot improvement. Check it out in game!
- Modified: Game Analysis X-axis and Y-axis both logged and improved to make it prettier and faster.

## ATTENTION!

We now allow everyone to contribute game robots to us. The instructions are in issue #31.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows x64 environment. If you want you run it on Mac or Linux, you can use `wine` to run it as an alternative option.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SZXC-WG/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.2.3D...v4.2.4D

items.body:
# Local Generals.io v4.2.3 (dev)

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this **developers' version** of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Fixed: Select errors when selecting some special maps.
- Added: Game analysis in local game. The three graphs are: land (up), army (mid) and army in hand (down).
- **The web functions of this release are buggy due to `v4.2`'s move storage changes. It may be fixed in a further release. If you want a stabler release, go check the "latest release" shown in the homepage.**

## ATTENTION!

We now allow everyone to contribute game robots to us. The instructions are in issue #31.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows x64 environment. If you want you run it on Mac or Linux, you can use `wine` to run it as an alternative option.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.2.2D...v4.2.3D

# Local Generals.io v4.2.0 (pre)

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Changed: Overall game move storage.
  **Note that the replay encoding system is changed too. Therefore, old replay files may not work any more.**
- **This release is set as a pre-release because its game speed control and web functions are buggy. It may be fixed through a `v4.2.1` release, or it will be fixed in `v5.0`.**

## ATTENTION!

We now allow everyone to contribute game robots to us. The instructions are in issue #31.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows x64 environment. If you want you run it on Mac or Linux, you can use `wine` to run it as an alternative option.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.1.0...v4.2.0

items.name: v4.1.0
items.body:
> **We recommend downloading the latest pre-releases, which are up-to-date. This release may already be outdated, as an enormous amount of the code base has changed since its publication.**

# Local Generals.io v4.1.0

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Changed: Replaced `Army In Hand` in ranklist to `AIH`.
- Changed: Big change! Replaced overall encoding to UTF-8. Note that the map config file's encoding has also changed, so old config files may not work. You can change the config file's encoding form to UTF-8 using tools like Notepad to fix that.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows x64 environment. If you want you run it on Mac or Linux, you can use `wine` to run it as an alternative option.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.0.1...v4.1.0

You can change the config file's encoding form to UTF-8 using tools like Notepad to fix that. **Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows x64 environment. If you want you run it on Mac or Linux, you can use `wine` to run it as an alternative option.** **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v4.0.1...v4.1.0

items.name: v4.0.0
items.body:
# LocalGen (new ver.) v4.0.0

> Given to you by @AppOfficer @chrhaa 

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Added: Brand new web support! Now you can play with your friends in the local Internet using the web functions!
- Added: Turn jumping in replay page. Skip to the turn whatever you want!
- Added: Unlocked local game flushing speed. Now, even the speed is low, the software will still flush as fast as it can.
- Modified: New UI layout! Check it out by your own!

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v3.1.0...v4.0.0

If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start. ## Changelog - Added: Brand new web support! Now you can play with your friends in the local Internet using the web functions! - Added: Turn jumping in replay page. Skip to the turn whatever you want! - Added: Unlocked local game flushing speed. Now, even the speed is low, the software will still flush as fast as it can. - Modified: New UI layout! items.name: v3.1.0
items.body:
# LocalGen (new ver.) v3.1.0

> Given to you by @AppOfficer @Ihave4oranges

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Added: Replay and Create Map support with pull requests #20 and #21. Thanks to @Ihave4oranges for writing these excellent codes! These functions are still in beta and in preview status.
- Added: Labels for beta and non-developed buttons.
- NOTES: The Create Map function will save the map in the `maps` folder, but it will not create the `ini` file automatically. You must create it by your own. The functions for it will be added in further versions. We are sorry for the inconvenience.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v3.0.2...v3.1.0

items.name: v3.0.2
items.body:
# LocalGen (new ver.) v3.0.2

By @AppOfficer

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

> P.S. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Added: The new UI is completed. Although all the functions (except local game) aren't completed, we make the buttons stay there and keep them temporarily unavailable.
- Added: New speed settings. Now you need to type the speed you like (between 1 and 10000) in a text box and press the `submit` button to set it. Note that if your computer is too slow, maybe some high speeds can't run properly on your computer. We advise to use speeds under 1000.
- Fixed: Time out when the count of players is bigger than the map could hold. Now we've set the count limits to make it always under the limit.
- Fixed: issue #15. Now the information is all displayed.
- Fixed: issue #11. With the new UI, the problem is fixed.
- Added: Map dragging and resizing in game. Use your scroller to resize, and long press your left mouse button and move to drag! If you want to choose a single block, just click the block, don't move the mouse and keep the clicking duration below 200ms.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v3.0.1...v3.0.2

If you want to choose a single block, just click the block, don't move the mouse and keep the clicking duration below 200ms. **Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.** **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v3.0.1...v3.0.2

# LocalGen (new ver.) v3.0.0 (pre-release)

By @AppOfficer

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this **pre** version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

p.s. If you haven't installed the font **Quicksand**, please find it under the `font` folder and install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Added: A new UI! We haven't finished it yet, so you can still see old UI somewhere.
- Added: DONATE button. We need your support!
- Added: Speed total control! Now the MAX SPEED is stable - 300x!
- Added: Some new default maps along with the release: "Arena" series and one single "gjr" map! Note that the "Geography" series also have a new map.
- Note that old maps may not fit in the new version.
- Note that some buttons in this version is still unavailable. They'll all be completed when the next standard version is released.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v2.1.0...v3.0.0

We haven't finished it yet, so you can still see old UI somewhere. - Added: DONATE button. We need your support! - Added: Speed total control! items.name: v2.1.0
items.body:
# LocalGen (new ver.) v2.1.0

By @AppOfficer

Thanks for your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On this special day, we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

p.s. If you haven't installed the font **Freestyle Script**, you can find it under the `font` folder, so install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Fixed: A bug that one can't click blocks at the edges to select them.
- Deleted: `dll` dependance for all maps.
- Added: A brand new `maps` directory to store all maps (also to replace `dll`)! One can also put his own map with extension `.lg` into the directory to import, but make sure to also create an `ini` file to state the map.
- Modified: Centered the army number in the blocks.
- Modified: When setting the fps, we've added it by 0.5 to make it more accurate.
- Find more updates by yourself!

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v2.0.2...v2.1.0

One can also put his own map with extension `.lg` into the directory to import, but make sure to also create an `ini` file to state the map. - Modified: Centered the army number in the blocks. - Modified: When setting the fps, we've added it by 0.5 to make it more accurate. - Find more updates by yourself! **Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.** **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/compare/v2.0.2...v2.1.0

# LocalGen (new ver.) v2.0.0

By @xiaruize0911 @AppOfficer @chrhaa @AllenJYL 

Thanks to your support and don't forget to **star** this project!

On the last day of the winter holiday (in China), we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

p.s. If you haven't installed the font **Freestyle Script**, you can find it under the `font` folder, so install it before you start.

## Changelog

- Brand new GUI! The UI is much better than the console.
- Add window size selection with `auto fit` option (full screen actually).
- Add clicking selecting, which means that now you can click a block to select it.

**Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.**
items.summary: # LocalGen (new ver.) v2.0.0 By @xiaruize0911 @AppOfficer @chrhaa @AllenJYL Thanks to your support and don't forget to **star** this project! On the last day of the winter holiday (in China), we are glad to release this version of the new LocalGen! **Click the download links below and start your game!** p.s. If you haven't installed the font **Freestyle Script**, you can find it under the `font` folder, so install it before you start. ## Changelog - Brand new GUI! The UI is much better than the console. - Add window size selection with `auto fit` option (full screen actually). - Add clicking selecting, which means that now you can click a block to select it. **Note that the LocalGen application is built in Windows environment.**
items.author: xiaruize0911

items.name: v1.0.2
items.body:
# **LocalGen (new ver.) v1.0.2**

By @AppOfficer @xiaruize0911 @chrhaa

To all Chinese people, **happy Chinese New Year!**

At this special holiday, we're happy to give you this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

Note that, if you run the program with no `dll` files in the same directory, you can't choose the default maps (even the special maps).

## Changelog

- cheatCode option extended. Now multiple player watching is available.
- We've rewritten the game message part. Now it is more standard and pretty.
- Turn numbers are added.
- We've written some in-game tips to help you play.

**We still need to warn that the LocalGen application can only run on Windows.**

Now multiple player watching is available. - We've rewritten the game message part. Now it is more standard and pretty. - Turn numbers are added. - We've written some in-game tips to help you play. **We still need to warn that the LocalGen application can only run on Windows.**

items.name: v1.0.1
items.body:
# **LocalGen (new ver.) v1.0.1**

By @AppOfficer @xiaruize0911 @chrhaa @AllenJYL 

To all Chinese people, **happy Chinese New Year!**

At this special holiday, we're happy to give you this version of the new LocalGen!

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

Note that, if you run the program with no `dll` files in the same directory, you can't choose the default maps (even the special maps).

## Changelog

- Fixed issue #9: One can only move their own army now!
- `Import Map` option fixed. Now you can import your own maps! Note that your file's extension should be `.lg` or `.lgmp`.
- Map printing rewritten and fixed known bugs.
- We've added the missing `|` at the bottom of map lines.

**We still need to warn that the LocalGen application can only run on Windows.**
items.summary: # **LocalGen (new ver.) v1.0.1** By @AppOfficer @xiaruize0911 @chrhaa @AllenJYL To all Chinese people, **happy Chinese New Year!** At this special holiday, we're happy to give you this version of the new LocalGen! **Click the download links below and start your game!** Note that, if you run the program with no `dll` files in the same directory, you can't choose the default maps (even the special maps). ## Changelog - Fixed issue #9: One can only move their own army now! - `Import Map` option fixed. Now you can import your own maps! Note that your file's extension should be `.lg` or `.lgmp`. - Map printing rewritten and fixed known bugs. - We've added the missing `|` at the bottom of map lines. **We still need to warn that the LocalGen application can only run on Windows.**
items.author: AppOfficer

items.name: v1.0.0
items.body:
# **LocalGen (new ver.) v1.0.0**

By @AppOfficer @xiaruize0911 @chrhaa @ktq1124298818 @AllenJYL 

To all Chinese people, **happy Chinese New Year's (Eve)!**

At this special holiday, we're happy to give you this first version of the new LocalGen!

## In this new version, we have

- **Completely self-written code. Thanks to all the contributors!**
- A new UI 
- A higher refreshing rate
- Better robots
- An unlimited game speed (which depends on your computer)
- Give up MapCreator (no need to generate files before using)
- Fixed issue #8.

## Contributor Details

- @AppOfficer  @chrhaa  main code & UI
- @xiaruize0911  Robot
- @ktq1124298818  Robot (not used)
- @AllenJYL zip&replay (developing)

**Click the download links below and start your game!**

## What's Changed
* add ktq's new bot by @ktq1124298818 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/1
* Fixed grammar mistakes. by @AllenJYL in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/2
* Update Bot by @xiaruize0911 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/4
* Updated xrzBot by @xiaruize0911 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/6
* Formatted by @xiaruize0911 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/7

## New Contributors
* @ktq1124298818 made their first contribution in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/1
* @AllenJYL made their first contribution in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/2
* @xiaruize0911 made their first contribution in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/4

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/commits/v1.0.0

**We still need to warn that the LocalGen application can only run on Windows.**
items.summary: # **LocalGen (new ver.) v1.0.0** By @AppOfficer @xiaruize0911 @chrhaa @ktq1124298818 @AllenJYL To all Chinese people, **happy Chinese New Year's (Eve)!** At this special holiday, we're happy to give you this first version of the new LocalGen! ## In this new version, we have - **Completely self-written code. Thanks to all the contributors!** - A new UI - A higher refreshing rate - Better robots - An unlimited game speed (which depends on your computer) - Give up MapCreator (no need to generate files before using) - Fixed issue #8. ## Contributor Details - @AppOfficer  @chrhaa  main code & UI - @xiaruize0911  Robot - @ktq1124298818  Robot (not used) - @AllenJYL zip&replay (developing) **Click the download links below and start your game!** ## What's Changed * add ktq's new bot by @ktq1124298818 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/1 * Fixed grammar mistakes. by @AllenJYL in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/2 * Update Bot by @xiaruize0911 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/4 * Updated xrzBot by @xiaruize0911 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/6 * Formatted by @xiaruize0911 in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/7 ## New Contributors * @ktq1124298818 made their first contribution in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/1 * @AllenJYL made their first contribution in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/2 * @xiaruize0911 made their first contribution in https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/pull/4 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/LocalGen-dev/LocalGen-new/commits/v1.0.0 **We still need to warn that the LocalGen application can only run on Windows.**
